series_metadata.series_description: All records pertaining to Developmental Center Residents including: • Birth, Death, Admission and Discharge Documents • Court Records • Medical, dental, and any other clinical records • Client Evaluations • Records of personal belongings • All client funds records

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for seven years after death or discharge of client or until scanned and saved electronically. Deposit all records described in R.C. 5123.31(A) with the Ohio History Connection and shred all other records. ; Electronic: Retain for seven years after death or discharge of a client then deposit records described in R.C. 5123.31(A) with the Ohio History Connection and delete all other records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
